title: Ben Roberts-Smith arrested: former Australian soldier charged with five war crime murders in Afghanistan
summary_full: Roberts-Smith previously failed in his attempt to sue three newspapers which published allegations he murdered unarmed civilians and bullied comradesFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastAustralia’s most decorated living soldier, Ben Roberts-Smith, has been arrested at Sydney airport and charged with war crimes.The Australian federal police and the Office of the Special Investigator announced details of the investigation in Sydney on Tuesday after midday.
